prompt: Compare the field condition against the referenced document, tag, drawing, or standard.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is X-103 Confined space within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: gas meter readout interpretation (O₂ 19.0% - enter or not? FD/DOC). The work is being assessed at the tested/inspected lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA 1910.146. A drawing, inspection checklist, equipment tag, or manufacturer instruction is available for comparison.
title: T1 X-103 Document interpretation
